content: It's been working out well to meet at Time Out Market in the Fenway so I'm thinking we can stick with it for August.
And I figure we can stick with 7pm.
There are a couple Sundays I can't do. I'm going to give them a :cross_mark: below. Please feel free to mark the dates that don't work for you!

I was actually gonna ask - how would you feel about trying Bow Market just one time before summer/fall is up? Not for another hackathon, just as a location for a meeting? We never really took advantage of it, being cooped up in that room for the power outlets. Similar to Time Out, it has food options and beer (and coffee).

Downsides include no nearby train stops, and potentially being stuck indoors anyway in case of rain (in which case could you bring food into that brewery? I dunno.)

(thinking about it more - I think Time Out would be a better place if we did another hackathon. Lots more indoor space.)
